name: Electronics
description: A comprehensive collection of electronic devices including smartphones, laptops, tablets, smartwatches, headphones, and other consumer electronics for personal computing and entertainment purposes.

name: Home Decor
description: Interior design and decoration items such as wall art, throw pillows, curtains, rugs, mirrors, vases, candles, and furniture accessories that enhance the aesthetic appeal of living spaces.

name: Sports
description: Athletic equipment and apparel including workout gear, running shoes, yoga mats, dumbbells, bicycles, sports balls, and training accessories for fitness enthusiasts and professional athletes.

name: Fashion
description: Clothing and accessories including shirts, pants, dresses, jackets, shoes, handbags, belts, scarves, and jewelry for men, women, and children across various styles and seasons.

name: Home & Kitchen
description: Essential household items and kitchenware such as cookware, bakeware, kitchen utensils, appliances, bedding, towels, cleaning supplies, and organizational products for home management.
